mechanics.name_guess: spray of ruby darts crossed the bay floor
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 011 > items > spray of ruby darts crossed the bay floor
mechanics.excerpt: spray of ruby darts crossed the bay floor in the blink of an eye slamming into the right shoulder of one guard_ went down; weapon lost, and writhed about clasping his left hand over the charred ruin of his shoulder: Two nearby guards dove behind the detached Atlas arm and began working their way closer while keeping cover behind various parts and equipment; Then recalled that the MechWarrior was not in my sight: spun around only to find him hunkered down behind the boxes, out of harm' way: He looked calm enough, catching my eye and offering shrug Jaime kneeled next to him_ arms extended in classic firing position as she fired her Nakjama over the top of their cover.
